hard_rules: Use canon/books/index.json as the identity source of truth.
Do not collapse Ethiopian-distinct books into Protestant or Catholic analogues.
Do not merge 1 Meqabyan with 1 Maccabees.
Do not merge 2 Meqabyan with 2 Maccabees.
Do not merge 3 Meqabyan with 3 Maccabees.
Graph, ontology, search, and LLM layers inherit identity from canon.
When aliases conflict with canonical identity, canonical identity wins.
When tradition-specific differences exist, preserve explicit distinctions.

llm_resolution_policy.fallback_behavior: defer to canon authority and preserved terminology
